title: Media Viewer & Stability Boost
description: We've made viewing your photos and videos easier than ever! Double-click any image or video in your conversations to open it in a full, distraction-free viewer. Plus, we've squashed several bugs to make RPLY more stable and reliable.
features: Double-click images and videos to open them in a dedicated full-screen viewer for better focus and clarity
fixes: Fixed app crashes that could occur when scrolling through conversations
Resolved an issue where duplicate NOX contacts could appear in your contact list
Improved overall app performance and stability
